corrections.note: Body prints lowercase κύριον, not capitalized.

corrections.current: δυναστευσει ℵ** hab μη ἐξακ. τη ψυχη σου [δ] τη ισχυι σου πορευεσθαι
corrections.correct: δυναστευσει ℵ** hab μη εξακολουθει. τη ψυχη σου [δ] τη ισχυι σου πορευεσθαι
corrections.note: Apparatus prints full word εξακολουθει followed by period, not abbreviation ἐξακ.
Printed text has rough-breathed/ accented ὡς.
Apparatus reads future ἐκτριβήσει, not subjunctive εκτριβησῃ.
Final sigma omitted; printed reading is ὠφελήσεις.
Corrector siglum is c.a in superscript style, matching earlier notation.

notes: Running head and body largely match. Left margin numbers are line indicators and are already handled acceptably in transcript. Apparatus contains a few transcription/normalization issues.
